title: Financial Statements
why_it_matters: Contains 3-year audited consolidated financial statements for McDonald's USA, LLC (Ernst & Young LLP audit). Includes income statement, balance sheet, cash flows, members' equity, and detailed notes. Essential for assessing franchisor financial health and viability.
key_burden_or_function: Auditor opinion is unqualified. Total revenues $10.63B, net income $3.46B (2024). Total assets $22.2B. Members' equity $10.2B (unchanged year-over-year as all net income dividended to parent). No going concern issues.

title: Franchise Agreement (Traditional)
why_it_matters: The primary franchise agreement for traditional full-menu restaurants (20-year term). Governs the vast majority (~95%) of franchised units. Contains all core obligations, fees, termination provisions, transfer restrictions, noncompete, and grant of rights.
key_burden_or_function: 20-year limited grant at specific address. No renewal right. No exclusive territory. Royalty 4% or 5% of Gross Sales. Franchisor selects site, owns/leases real estate. Franchisee pays rent plus royalty. Includes state-specific riders for HI, IL, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI.

title: Franchise Agreement (Satellite)
why_it_matters: Franchise agreement for Satellite locations (Walmart, airports, malls, hospitals, universities). Term varies by location. Scaled-down menu possible. Lower investment threshold.
key_burden_or_function: Similar structure to traditional but adapted for satellite locations. Term depends on site. Initial fee $0–$500. Annual fee $500–$2,500.

title: Franchise Agreement (Walmart)
why_it_matters: Specific franchise agreement for McDonald's-in-Walmart locations. No initial franchise fee. Fixed Percentage Rent generally 14%–15.5% of Gross Sales.
key_burden_or_function: Walmart-specific terms. No initial franchise fee. Fixed Percentage Rent based on actual sales volume.

title: New Restaurant Rider
why_it_matters: Attached to franchise agreements for new restaurants. Includes Schedule A for pollution coverage at Oil sites.
key_burden_or_function: Supplements franchise agreement for new restaurant builds. Oil site pollution coverage addendum.

title: BFL Rider
why_it_matters: Business Facilities Lease rider with conditional option to purchase restaurant assets after year 1, potentially extending franchise to 20 years.
key_burden_or_function: 3-year BFL term with option to purchase. Minimum option price determined case-by-case. Includes Oil site pollution coverage addendum.

title: Operator's Lease
why_it_matters: The Operator's Lease is incorporated into every Franchise Agreement. It governs the real estate relationship — the core of McDonald's franchise model. McDonald's owns/leases the real estate and subleases to franchisee. 33 pages covering fundamental lease provisions, rent structure, maintenance, utilities, assignment, default, and miscellaneous provisions.
key_burden_or_function: Franchisee pays Base Rent + Pass Thru Rent + Percentage Rent. Responsible for property taxes, insurance, site maintenance, structural repairs. Multiple Landlord's Interest Addenda for different ownership structures (LLC leased, Corp leased, fee owned, Oil partner). Co-branded development addendum. Excess property addendum. Operator Extension of Term language.

title: Assignment to an Entity
why_it_matters: Template for assigning franchise from individual to corporation/partnership/LLC. Includes equity listing.
key_burden_or_function: Corporation name cannot include McDonald's names/trademarks. No assignment/transfer without prior written consent. Includes alternate paragraphs for different entity types.

title: Assignment Agreement
why_it_matters: Template for franchise transfer to individual purchaser. Lists assumed obligations including OPNAD, local cooperative, Muzak/other, gift certificate obligations.
key_burden_or_function: Assignee assumes all listed obligations. No transfer without McDonald's consent. Includes exhibits for assumed obligations, ownership percentages, and liabilities due McDonald's.

title: Candidate Agreements (Preliminary Agreement)
why_it_matters: Must be signed before entering training program. No guarantee of franchise offer. McDonald's may remove from program for any reason. No compensation during training. Not an employee. Includes Independent Contractor Agreement and confidentiality provisions.
key_burden_or_function: No franchise guarantee. No compensation. Not an employee. Confidentiality obligation survives. McDonald's can terminate training at any time. If Candidate doesn't acquire franchise within 4 years, loses qualified status.

title: McDonald's U.S. New Term Policy
why_it_matters: The New Term Policy (effective January 1, 2025) governs whether a franchisee receives a new 20-year term at franchise expiration. This is NOT a contract right — it is a discretionary policy. Critical for understanding franchise continuity risk.
key_burden_or_function: New term offered at McDonald's sole discretion. Based on National Franchising Standards performance. Rent may increase under then-current policy. Not part of the Franchise Agreement.

title: McDonald's U.S. Growth Policy
why_it_matters: Governs acquisition of additional franchises. Franchisee has no right to acquire additional units; growth is at McDonald's discretion based on performance against National Franchising Standards.
key_burden_or_function: Growth requires consistently meeting or exceeding National Franchising Standards. Policy effective May 1, 2025.

title: New Term Offer Letter
why_it_matters: Template for the new-term franchise offer. Shows that initial fee at new term may be higher than previous, and rent structure determined by then-current policies.
key_burden_or_function: Initial fee due at start of new term. New term rent based on then-current policies.

title: Loan and Related Documents
why_it_matters: Extensive loan document package (35 pages) for McDonald's predecessor-guaranteed loans from Bank of America. Includes Promissory Note, Security Agreement, ACH Authorization, Unlimited Guaranty, various entity certificates, and Operator Assistance Program Agreement.
key_burden_or_function: Floating rate note (Term SOFR + 0.10% + 3.00%). 3–5 year terms, 7-year amortization. Secured by restaurant equipment/signage/decor/inventory. Personal guarantee from franchisee and spouse required. Loan default = Franchise Agreement default. Operator Assistance Program Agreement requires waiver of all claims against McDonald's.

title: List of Agents for Service of Process
why_it_matters: State-by-state listing of registered agents (Corporation Service Company in most states).
key_burden_or_function: Administrative compliance. No direct burden on franchisee.

title: State Administrators
why_it_matters: Contact information for state franchise regulatory agencies.
key_burden_or_function: Reference information for regulatory inquiries.

title: McDonald's Affiliates
why_it_matters: Lists international McDonald's affiliates that offer franchises outside the US, including business addresses and dates of first owned restaurant and first franchise.
key_burden_or_function: Shows global franchise network structure. International affiliates include McDonald's Australia, various European entities, etc.

title: List of Franchised Restaurants
why_it_matters: Complete list of all U.S. franchised restaurants as of December 31, 2024 — approximately 12,887 locations. Lists franchisee name, restaurant address, and telephone number by state. Spans 144 pages.
key_burden_or_function: Required FDD disclosure. Enables prospective franchisees to contact current operators. Essential for market analysis and due diligence.

title: List of Franchisees Who Ceased Doing Business
why_it_matters: Lists 113 franchisees whose franchise was terminated, canceled, not renewed, or otherwise voluntarily/involuntarily ceased to do business during the most recent fiscal year, or who have not communicated within 10 weeks of application date.
key_burden_or_function: Shows system attrition. Note: some current and former franchisees may have signed provisions restricting their ability to speak about experience with McDonald's.

title: State Specific Addenda
why_it_matters: State-specific legal modifications covering California (Fast Food Act AB 1228), Hawaii (filing notice), Maryland (release/bankruptcy/forum), Minnesota (trademark protection/90-day termination/180-day non-renewal), North Dakota (non-compete unenforceability), Washington (Assurance of Discontinuance re no-poach + franchise protection act). Plus state effective dates page.
key_burden_or_function: California: compliance with Fast Food Act is solely franchisee responsibility. Maryland: releases cannot apply to MD Franchise Law liability. Minnesota: 90-day termination notice with 60-day cure, 180-day non-renewal notice. North Dakota: non-compete likely unenforceable. Washington: no-poach clause removed per AOD with Attorney General.
